violations.description: Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. Need to remove brooms away from front of sink.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory * was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. Paper towels needed for drying hands.
